name: Doubao (ByteDance)
narrative: Doubao is ByteDance's large language model, developed by the company behind TikTok and Douyin. ByteDance has global reach through its consumer platforms and is aggressively investing in AI to compete with both US and Chinese rivals. Doubao reflects ByteDance's position: global ambitions constrained by geopolitical pressure, strong in consumer-facing AI, operating under Chinese regulatory requirements while trying to maintain international legitimacy.
